title: Pearl Enters the Fight
description: On pages 13–16, Krieg’s forces push harder against the Baratie, using numbers, weapons, and intimidation while Sanji and the cooks struggle to hold the line.
scene: The restaurant becomes a battlefield where Krieg’s idea of strength clashes with the Baratie’s pride and the Straw Hats’ refusal to yield.

dialogue.speaker: Pearl
dialogue.text: Krig Pirates 2nd Division Commander IRON WALL PEARL

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Haaaa hahaha! You won't be standin' after my lethal punch!

dialogue.speaker: Pearl
dialogue.text: You just got a good taste of my special "pearl present"!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hey look! This guy's got a damn fine knife on him!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Heh heh, don't mind if I do. This should cut better than my knife.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Let go of your damn hand!

summary: This part keeps increasing the pressure on the Baratie and exposes the brutality of Krieg’s command structure.
